tech_news.title: Apple WWDC 2026 keynote event: Live updates on iOS 27 and Siri - Mashable
tech_news.description: Mashable is covering Apple's annual Worldwide Developers Conference with live updates. Get real-time updates on the latest news.

tech_news.title: Apple’s iOS 27 Is Filled With Hints About Its Upcoming Foldable iPhone - Bloomberg.com
tech_news.description: Apple Inc.’s iOS 27 and related software updates offer the clearest public signs yet of the company’s upcoming foldable iPhone, revealing references to folding hardware and new features designed for larger, more flexible displays.

tech_news.title: 5 things I already love from the iOS 27 beta - The Verge
tech_news.description: I’ve already been testing the first iOS 27 developer beta, and there are some features that I’m a big fan of, like Liquid Glass improvements and a new extra large option for widgets.

tech_news.description: "I can confirm this is not true"

tech_news.title: Apple confirms watchOS 27 will run on Apple Watch Series 9 - 9to5Mac
tech_news.description: Although watchOS 27 drops support for several older Apple Watch models, Apple has confirmed to 9to5Mac that one compatible model was mistakenly left out of its official list.

tech_news.title: Gemini 3.5 and Antigravity come to Google NotebookLM - Ars Technica
tech_news.description: NotebookLM is getting a big upgrade, but it's only for AI Ultra and enterprise accounts right now.

tech_news.title: Apple announces visionOS 27 with Siri AI - The Verge
tech_news.description: Apple announced visionOS 27 which will launch this fall with Siri AI, curved app windows, new support for panoramas, and more on the Vision Pro.

tech_news.title: macOS 27 'Golden Gate' delivers more Liquid Glass and updated Siri - AppleInsider
tech_news.description: Apple has unveiled its next Mac operating system, macOS Golden Gate, with Apple promising better performance, the improved Siri, and more.
